Numerical Semigroups — genus 2 to 13 (list)

One row per numerical semigroup, ordered by (g, m, q₁). Columns c1,j are entries of the first column of the reduced Kunz matrix Cred; rows with m−1 < 13 are zero-padded to 13 columns. For aggregate counts, see semigroup_g_from2to13_summary.html; the same data is also available as JSON in semigroup_g_from2to13_list.json.

gmfeσrrafgtSymgenPFWilf1/ec1,1c1,2c1,3c1,4c1,5c1,6c1,7c1,8c1,9c1,10c1,11c1,12c1,13
